summary: Completed testing of Evolution PRO Stripe Payment (€67 analysis) and Growth System features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Growth System page fully functional with API integration. Stripe checkout API working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Payment button in Vista Cliente demo mode fails with AxiosError because it uses demo user_id which doesn't exist in database. This is expected behavior for demo mode - real users with valid IDs work correctly.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Demo mode limitation, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Stripe API key updated and working - checkout sessions created successfully
Growth-level endpoints correctly validate level values (foundation/growth/scale)
Growth-level endpoints correctly return 404 for non-existent partners
Growth-level data persisted to MongoDB 'growth_levels' collection
GrowthSystemPage.jsx correctly loads existing level on mount and shows it as selected
GrowthSystemPage.jsx correctly saves level selection via POST API when clicking CTA button
AttivazioneAnalisi.jsx has data-testid='attiva-analisi-btn' for payment button
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Test clients: c407e3fc-5136-48f5-9162-babda5adccc8, 52f828ee-fa88-4761-81be-a7eab23fa7e2, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and Partner 2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment for €67 analysis is working. Growth System page is fully functional with backend integration. Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has growth level 'growth' saved. The Vista Cliente demo mode uses fake user_id='demo' which causes 404 on checkout - this is expected demo behavior, not a bug.

features_tested.POST /api/cliente-analisi/checkout with: PASS - Returns checkout_url with Stripe session
features_tested.GET /api/partner-journey/growth-level/{p: PASS - Returns saved level or null
features_tested.Frontend: Growth System page loads: PASS - Hero, diagnostic block, level cards all render
features_tested.Frontend: Growth System scenario selecti: PASS - Clicking scenario highlights it and expands recommended level
features_tested.Frontend: Growth System level selection: PASS - Clicking CTA saves to backend and shows confirmation
features_tested.Frontend: Growth System loads existing l: PASS - Previously saved level shown as selected on page load
features_tested.Frontend: €67 payment page displays: PASS - Price, button, SSL badges all visible
features_tested.Frontend: Payment button clickable: PASS - Button enabled and triggers checkout API

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real. Stripe checkout creates real sessions (redirects to production Stripe). Telegram notifications sent to admin on growth level selection.
